result_summary: The "Super Bowl Shuffle" is an iconic music video and song performed by the 1985 Chicago Bears as part of their Super Bowl XX run. It blended sports history, pop culture, and charity, and remains one of the most memorable highlights of NFL and Bears history. These results focus specifically on the "Super Bowl Shuffle" and its enduring connection to the team's Super Bowl victory and legacy.

results.title: The Super Bowl Shuffle | Chicago Bears (1985)
results.snippet: The Super Bowl Shuffle is a rap song performed by the Chicago Bears football team in 1985. Released before their victory in Super Bowl XX, it became a hit and symbolized the team's confidence and charisma.
